message.content:
Explore the codebase at D:\project\info-gitlab\hr thoroughly. I need to understand:

1. What subdirectories exist (hr-server, hr-core, hr-frontend, etc.)
2. For each sub-project: what tech stack is used (check package.json, composer.json, pom.xml, etc.)
3. Build commands, test commands, lint commands
4. High-level architecture (routing, controllers, models, etc.)
5. Any existing README.md, CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .cursor/rules/, .github/copilot-instructions.md files
6. Key configuration files

Do NOT read vendor/ or node_modules/ directories. Focus on project-level files.

Be very thorough - check all sub-projects.
